is the 99th chapter of Fullmetal Alchemist.

Synopsis

Chapter Notes

In magazine version of the chapter during the battle between Greed, Fu, and Wrath, Wrath steals Fu's sword and cuts him down with it. In the previous panel, however, he is shown holding the sword he lost to Buccaneer. This is fixed in the bound volume version.
